sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Equifax Introduces Income Confirm to Strengthen Decisioning Confidence During the Credit Card Origination Process
feed.summary: Equifax (NYSE: EFX) has launched Income Confirm, a new product that integrates verified employment and income data from The Work Number with an Equifax Consumer Credit Report. This aims to improve decision-making confidence for lenders during credit card origination, helping them better assess risk, assign credit lines, and expedite approvals. The product provides key data points such as applicant employee name/SSN, employer name, employment status, and calculated annualized income.

feed.title: Equifax Introduces Income Confirm to Strengthen Decisioning Confidence During the Credit Card Origination Process
feed.summary: Equifax has launched Income Confirm, a new product integrating verified employment and income data from The Work Number with an Equifax Consumer Credit Report. This offering aims to enhance credit card origination by providing lenders with a more comprehensive view of applicant risk and financial capacity. Income Confirm helps lenders make faster, more accurate decisions and optimize initial credit lines, leading to a smoother experience for applicants.

feed.title: Caterpillar Inc. $CAT Stock Holdings Decreased by OneAscent Financial Services LLC

feed.title: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) Announces $2.4 Billion Acquisition of Entrust Strategic Purchase Agreement Set to Enhance Leidos' Market Position
feed.summary: Leidos Holdings (LDOS) has announced its acquisition of Entrust for $2.4 billion in cash through a Stock Purchase Agreement with KENE Holdings, L.P. and KENE Parent, Inc. The acquisition is expected to close in Q2 2026, pending regulatory approvals and customary closing conditions, and will be financed by a $1.4 billion bridge credit facility and other available funds. This strategic move aims to expand Leidos' capabilities and market reach.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Taps Amazon Web Services Executive to Expand AI Use
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has hired Faraz Shafiq from Amazon Web Services to lead its artificial intelligence initiatives. His role will involve identifying company-wide needs for generative and agentic AI and collaborating with technology teams to develop and manage these products, aiming to enhance operational efficiency. This move signifies Wells Fargo's commitment to expanding its use of AI.

feed.title: Marketaxess Holdings Inc. Announces Board Appointments, Effective March 1, 2026
feed.summary: MarketAxess Holdings Inc. announced the election of Douglas Cifu and Kenneth Schiciano to its Board of Directors, effective March 1, 2026. Mr. Cifu, co-founder and former CEO of Virtu Financial, brings expertise in financial technology and market making. Mr. Schiciano, a Senior Advisor at TA Associates, offers extensive experience in the private equity industry with a focus on infrastructure, software, and financial technology investments.

feed.title: My Top AI Healthcare Stock to Buy and Hold for 20 Years
feed.summary: Eli Lilly is expanding its artificial intelligence (AI) capabilities through several strategic initiatives, including launching an AI drug discovery platform, partnering with Nvidia to build an AI supercomputer, and establishing an AI drug discovery lab. These efforts are expected to improve the company's already strong innovative capacity and reduce R&D costs and time. Combined with its leadership in the weight-loss market and diverse pipeline, Eli Lilly is positioned for long-term growth, making it a strong candidate for a 20-year buy-and-hold investment despite not being a current top pick by The Motley Fool Stock Advisor team.

feed.title: Duke Energy crews addressing power outages across Triad, thousands on standby across state
feed.summary: Duke Energy crews are actively responding to power outages across North Carolina due to a winter storm, particularly in mountainous and rural areas where ice accumulation is causing branches to fall on power lines. While thousands of crew members remain on standby in Greensboro, only a small number of outages are currently reported in the Triad. The company prioritizes restoration efforts, starting with critical facilities like hospitals and 911 centers, then moving to main power feeds.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics (STLD) Beats Q4 2025 EPS Estimates but Revenue Misses
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (STLD) reported Q4 2025 EPS of $1.83, exceeding estimates, but missed revenue projections with $4.41 billion. The company attributed the revenue miss to lower average realized selling values and reduced volumes due to seasonal demand and longer-than-anticipated maintenance outages. Despite challenges, Steel Dynamics maintains an optimistic outlook for 2026, anticipating improved market conditions and strong domestic demand for its steel and aluminum products, particularly with ongoing expansion of its aluminum facilities.

feed.title: Cummins Introduces MFLEX4 Air Disc Brake Pad
feed.summary: Cummins has launched the Meritor MFLEX4 air disc brake pad, a patent-pending product designed for the heavy-duty aftermarket. This new brake pad aims to improve durability, service efficiency, and fitment coverage by being compatible with four widely used air disc brake calipers, covering an estimated 70% of the Class 8 truck and trailer market. The MFLEX4 is also intended to simplify inventory and reduce complexity for fleets and distributors, offering two friction options and uniform pricing.

feed.title: Caterpillar’s Robust Order Book Fuels Investor Confidence
feed.summary: Caterpillar is poised for strong earnings, backed by a record $39.9 billion order backlog providing multi-year visibility. Market analysts anticipate increased EPS and have raised price targets, highlighting confidence in Caterpillar's role as a hybrid entity in traditional machinery and technology infrastructure sectors. Investors await the January 29th earnings report to confirm sustained momentum or potential volatility due to its premium valuation.

feed.title: DeFi Technologies Announces Valour Receives UK Regulatory Approval and Begins Offering Select Yield-Bearing Crypto ETPs to UK Retail Investors via the London Stock Exchange
feed.summary: DeFi Technologies, through its subsidiary Valour, has received UK regulatory approval to offer select yield-bearing crypto ETPs to UK retail investors. These products will be available via the London Stock Exchange starting January 26, 2026. This move bridges traditional capital markets with decentralized finance for UK investors.

feed.title: DeFi Technologies Announces Valour Receives UK Regulatory Approval and Begins Offering Select Yield-Bearing Crypto ETPs to UK Retail Investors via the London Stock Exchange
feed.summary: DeFi Technologies announced that its subsidiary, Valour Inc., has received UK regulatory approval from the FCA and on the London Stock Exchange to offer select yield-bearing crypto ETPs to UK retail investors, starting January 26, 2026. The approved products include 1Valour Bitcoin Physical Staking (ISIN: GB00BRBV3124) and 1Valour Ethereum Physical Staking (ISIN: GB00BRBMZ190), expanding access beyond professional investors. This move allows UK retail investors to gain regulated exposure to Bitcoin and Ethereum with a staking yield component through traditional brokerage accounts.

feed.title: Brown & Brown (BRO) Announces Leadership Change in Legal Department
feed.summary: Brown & Brown Inc. (BRO) has announced a leadership change in its legal department following the passing of Chief Legal Officer Robert Mathis. Eileen Akerson will serve as interim Chief Legal Officer. The company, a diversified insurance agency, reported strong financial performance with consistent revenue growth and expanding operating margins, but its Altman Z-Score indicates potential financial challenges.

feed.title: Steel Dynamics shares rise as fourth quarter earnings beat expectations
feed.summary: Steel Dynamics (NASDAQ:STLD) exceeded analyst expectations for its fourth-quarter earnings, reporting $1.82 per diluted share against a $1.69 consensus. Despite revenue falling slightly short at $4.4 billion compared to the anticipated $4.53 billion, shares rose 2.6% post-announcement. The company cited solid operational performance and anticipates improved market conditions, including trade stability and a favorable interest rate environment, to support future demand.

feed.title: Evercore ISI reiterates Outperform rating on Boston Scientific stock
feed.summary: Evercore ISI has reiterated its Outperform rating on Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) and set a $112.00 price target, adding it to their Tactical Outperform list. The firm believes fears regarding procedure slowdowns and Boston Scientific’s acquisition of Penumbra (PEN) are overstated, pointing to market share gains in Japan with the Farapulse product and the strategic nature of the Penumbra deal. Analysts find Boston Scientific shares compelling, projecting 5% to 10% upside on earnings.

feed.title: Jefferies lowers NiSource stock price target to $49 from $50, keeps Buy rating
feed.summary: Jefferies has reiterated its Buy rating on NiSource (NYSE:NI) but has slightly reduced its price target from $50 to $49. The firm notes that the new target still implies a 13% upside from the current stock price, and NiSource's shares are considered appealing among utilities due to strong projected earnings per share growth. The analysis highlights potential for further growth driven by future GenCo deals and its relationship with Amazon.
